ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "slope_val" REAL /* Slope value of the soil sample */,
  "tri_val" REAL /* Triangularity value of the soil sample */,
  "soil_integrity" REAL /* Soil integrity score */,
  "fault_distance" REAL /* Distance to nearest fault line */,
  "ls_class" INTEGER /* Land stability classification */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Geographical location of the sample collection */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sample collection site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, loam, sand) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during sample collection (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_fault_distance FOREIGN KEY ("fault_distance") REFERENCES fault_lines ("fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_ls_class FOREIGN KEY ("ls_class") REFERENCES stability_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil sample */,
  "organic_content" REAL /* Percentage of organic content in the soil */,
  "nutrient_levels" TEXT /* Levels of key nutrients (e.g., nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium) */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Percentage of moisture in the soil */,
  "carbon_content" REAL /* Percentage of carbon in the soil */,
  "microbial_activity" TEXT /* Level of microbial activity in the soil */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis findings */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations from the analysis */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's geographical and environmental characteristics */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use (e.g., agricultural, residential, industrial) */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Type of land cover (e.g., forest, grassland, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_lines" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fault line */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the fault line */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the fault line */,
  "distance_to_site" REAL /* Distance to the nearest site from the fault line */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the fault line */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the fault line */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the fault line */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last known activity on the fault line */,
  "historical_activity" TEXT /* Historical activity data (e.g., number of earthquakes, magnitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land stability class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the class signifies regarding land stability */,
  "min_slope_val" REAL /* Minimum slope value for the class */,
  "max_slope_val" REAL /* Maximum slope value for the class */,
  "min_tri_val" REAL /* Minimum triangularity value for the class */,
  "max_tri_val" REAL /* Maximum triangularity value for the class */,
  "min_soil_integrity" REAL /* Minimum soil integrity score for the class */,
  "max_soil_integrity" REAL /* Maximum soil integrity score for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of how the method is conducted */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the analysis */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of conducting the analysis */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the analysis method (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
